title: The Book of Soyga — Universal Cipher Edition
description: First comprehensive reconstruction and analysis of the Book of Soyga (Aldaraia sive Soyga vocor). 21 chapters covering mathematical foundations, astronomical correlations, harmonic analysis, and comparative Voynich studies. Identifies a 32x32 meta-matrix lattice as the structural core of the thirty-two tables.

creators.name: Vallance, Richard Steven
creators.affiliation: The People Focused Group, Doncaster, UK
